Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion

Class CsvOptions.Builder

      public CsvOptions.Builder hasHeader(boolean hasHeader)
      Sets whether the CSV has a header row.

      Returns:

      public CsvOptions.Builder escape(Byte escape)
      Sets the escape character byte.
      Parameters:
      escape - the escape byte, or null for no escape
      Returns:
      this builder

    • terminator

      public CsvOptions.Builder terminator(Byte terminator)
      Sets the line terminator byte.
      Parameters:
      terminator - the terminator byte, or null for default
      Returns:
      this builder

    • doubleQuote

      public CsvOptions.Builder doubleQuote(boolean doubleQuote)
      Sets whether to use double quotes for escaping.
      Parameters:
      doubleQuote - true to use double quotes
      Returns:
      this builder

    • newlinesInValues

      public CsvOptions.Builder newlinesInValues(boolean newlinesInValues)
      Sets whether newlines in values are supported.
      Parameters:
      newlinesInValues - true to support newlines in values
      Returns:
      this builder
